_comment: Pinned reference values for NEAR AI Cloud TEE backends (mainnet). Captured 2026-05-05 from https://cloud-api.near.ai/v1/attestation/report. The Base on-chain DstackKms/DstackApp registries are the authoritative source for app_id/compose_hash/os_image_hash/kms_pubkey; until hermes ships an RPC reader (Block B), we pin known-good values here. Refresh on operator rotation. Source captures: case-studies/near-ai-private-inference/sources/.

zai-org/GLM-5.1-FP8._note: two compose hashes observed within ~30min on 2026-05-05 — operator rotated compose on the same backend (same signing_address) without key rotation. Both kept until clarified.
